title: Julius Caesar and the End of the Republic
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Julius Caesar rose through ambition, debt, politics, and war until he overshadowed the Roman Republic itself. This factual narrative follows his rise, the Gallic Wars, Alesia, the crossing of the Rubicon, civil war, dictatorship, and assassination.

chapters.title: Ambition in a Republic Under Strain
Gaul and the Making of a Legend
Alesia and the Edge of Greatness
